title: Takara PrimeSTAR GXL PCR
description: Takara Bio PrimeSTAR GXL DNA Polymerase: 50 uL robust high-fidelity reaction with a 68 C extension, for long and difficult templates.

payload.notes: Vendor: Takara Bio, PrimeSTAR GXL DNA Polymerase (Cat. R050A). PrimeSTAR GXL extends at 68 C for both 2-step and 3-step protocols (this is the GXL characteristic). Annealing: set 60 C when primer Tm > 55 C, or 55 C when Tm <= 55 C. Standard extension 1 min/kb; a Rapid protocol (double the enzyme to 2 uL) extends at 10 sec/kb (3-step) or 20 sec/kb (2-step). For targets >= 10 kb use a 2-step protocol (98 C/10 sec; 68 C, ~1 min/kb). Primers 0.2-0.3 uM (use >= 0.3 uM for >= 10 kb). 30 cycles. No separate initial-denaturation, final-extension, or hold step is published. Do not use dUTP or inosine-containing primers. Source: https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/R050A/R050A_e.v1906Da-a_117055.pdf
